titleStmt.title: SII 30.99: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 99. (A.R. No. 176 of 1915.) Tirumukkūḍal, Madhurantakam Taluk, Chingleput District Veṅkaṭēśa Perumāḷ temple-on the east wall Rājēndra-Chōḻa I: year 3: 1015 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of 3 kaḻañju of gold for the expenses of the festival of Māsimakam in the temple of Tirumukkūḍal-āḷvar of Śri Madhurāntakachchaturvēdimaṅgalam, an independent village in Jayaṅkoṇḍasōḻa-maṇḍalam by Nārāyaṇakramavittaṉ, a resident of Śri Vishṇuchēri Piṇukkipuṟam and also a member of village assembly (āluṅgaṇam). The priests of the temple agreed to provide for the special food offerings and sacred bath on the festival day by the interest of the gold endowed.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesaripanmarāṉa śrīrājentracoḻa tevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 vatu jayaṅ
koṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattut taniyūr śrīmadhurān=takaccaturvveti maṅkalattut tirumukkū
ṭalāḷvārupāsakaroṅ kaittiṭṭu Ivvūr yāḷuṅkaṇattāruḷ śrīviṣṇuccerip piṇuk
kippuṟattu nārāyaṇakramavidhdhaṉRead- kramavittaṉkaiyāl yāṅkaḷ koṇṭu kaṭava poṉ kācu niṟaikka
llālt tuḷainiṟai mukkaḻañcu Ippoṉ koṇṭa paricāvatu Ivvāṭṭai mācit tiṅka
ḷ mutalk kaḻañciṉvāyt tiṅkaḷiraṇṭu māppoṉ policaiyāka Etirāṭṭai māciya
ḷavum polin=ta poṉ Oṉpatu mañcāṭikkum Ēṟiluñ curuṅkilum poṉ kaḻañciṉukku ḷa nāṟ
patinkāṭi vaṇṇamāka(māka) Ippoṉ Oṉpatu mañcāṭikkum van=ta ḷappatiṉeṇ kāṭiyuṅ
koṇṭu tirumukkūṭalāḷvār mācimakan=tirtdhamāṭi Eḻun=taruḷinavāṟe peruntiruvamirtu ce
yvikkakkaṭava nibhandhamāvatu pūrikkuttalarici madhurān=takanoṭokku marakkālāl nāṟkāṭik
kum Aiñciraṇṭu vaṇṇattāl van=ta ḷa p patiṉkā ṭiyuṅ kaṟiyamutu Oṉṟiraṇ
ṭāka l(ā)vanaRead- lavaṇamUḷḷiṭṭuk kaṟiyamutukaḷukku I muṉṉāḻi muvuḻakkākak kaṟiyamutu
patiṉaiñcinukku I Eḻukuṟuṇiyum puḷiṅkaṟiyamutukkuk kiḻāṉ patakkinukku ka
ṟiyamutu patakkinukku It tūṇiyum porikkaṟiyamutu nāliṉukku ney Uḻakku nāliṉukku ney nāliṉukku ney nāliṉukku ney nāliṉukku ney
Amutu ceyya ney Irunāḻi muḻākkum Āka neymutu muṉṉāḻikkum Ēṟiluñ curuṅki
lum ney nāḻikku It tūṇiyāka I mukkāṭiyun tayiramutu patakkinukku It tūṇiyum Aṭai
kkāyamutukkup pākku nāṟpatum veṟṟilaippaṟṟu Iraṇṭinukku Ip patakkum viṟakukku
Ip patakkuṅ kalamiṭukucavanukku Ik kuṟuṇiyum Āka Ipparicu Āṇṭuvarai mācimaka
n=toṟum śantrādittavaṟ Ippaṭi perun=tiruvamirtu ceyvikkak kaṭavomāka Oṭṭik
kaittiṭṭiṭṭuk kuṭuttom Āḷvārupāsakarom Ivai kāśyapaṉ kumarayapaṭṭa
ṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 30.99 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
